package rulecoverage

func NegativeRangeOverLocalChannelWithoutClose() string {
    ruleID := "range_over_local_channel_without_close"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Functions that range over a locally owned channel without an observed close path."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
